previous_checkpoint.summary: TASK-076 was the latest completed checkpoint.

changes_since_last_checkpoint.summary: TASK-076 completed: v6.7 release closure: ship Verifiable Governance

After v6.7.0, run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task. Candidate direction is v6.8 Executable Quality Ledger, but do not open implementation work until situation-assess, release-state-audit, and Council review confirm the bounded next frontier. QIF boundary: direction selection is planning evidence, not proof that the next frontier is semantically optimal.
